A drink bomb that turns water into bar-quality magic — in under 2 minutes.

Drrop Mix is India's first lifestyle-driven instant beverage mix: a single-serve "drink bomb" that turns water or soda into a bar-quality mocktail or cocktail. Premium syrup taste, tonic-style convenience, quick-commerce ready.

The Gap

Why is cola the default at every Indian party?

Because the category has left a gaping hole between sugary RTDs and the bar cart. Hosts want to impress. Guests want variety. Nobody wants to blend five ingredients at 9pm.

68%of urban Indian millennials say they serve cola/juice at home not out of preference — but because nothing else is effortless.

Tap the cards to flip them

01 · The Problem

Host-Night Friction

  • Complex preparation. Syrups + mixology need 4-5 ingredients, tools, and shelf-life juggling.
  • Lack of variety at home. Cola, juice or a dusty bottle of mixer — the home bar stops there.
  • Clutter & waste. 750ml syrups take fridge space, go flat, and rarely get finished.
  • FOMO culture. Reels-fed guests expect restaurant-grade drinks. Hosts can't deliver.
→ Tap for why consumers care
01 · Why Consumers Care

The Signal Is Loud.

  • 9 in 10 urban millennials host at home at least once a month.
  • 70% avoid making cocktails/mocktails because they "feel like too much work".
  • Gen Z is driving a reels-led FOMO wave around aesthetic at-home serves.
  • They want premium & effortless — today, the shelf forces them to choose one.
68%
Serve cola by default
9/10
Host at home / month
02 · The Drrop Answer

One Drop. Full Ritual.

  • Under 2 minutes from pack to party-ready glass — water or soda, that's it.
  • Bar-quality flavour crafted with food scientists & mixologists.
  • No artificial preservatives · low calorie · clean-label.
  • Stackable, shelf-stable single-serve — built for q-commerce & gifting.
→ Tap for the size of the prize
02 · The Size Of The Prize

India's Mixer Wave.

  • India non-alcoholic mixer market on track to ₹5,500 Cr by 2030.
  • At-home premium beverage spend growing ~14% YoY post-pandemic.
  • Quick-commerce needs a single-serve premium mixer SKU — whitespace today.
  • HoReCa + gifting & corporate hampers unlock a second margin lane.
₹5,500 Cr
Mixer market by 2030
~14%
Category CAGR
The Product

Three signature flavours. Infinite occasions.

Each Drrop is a crafted flavour story — not a replacement for fruit juice, but a lifestyle upgrade from it.

Bold · Tropical · Spiced

Mango Mexico

Sun-ripened Alphonso meets a whisper of Mexican chilli. A tropical kick that's bright, bold, and instantly transportive — our signature hero SKU.

Pair with chilled water for a crisp summer refresher. Pair with gin, tequila, or soda for a party-ready cocktail in seconds.

Serves
1 × 250ml
Makes
3 drinks per pack
MRP
₹199 (single) / ₹1,199 (6-pack)
Base
Water or Soda
Abv Pair
Gin · Tequila · Rum
Prep Time
Under 2 minutes
Buy on Amazon
Elegant · Floral · Berry-Forward

Brunei Berry

A velvet-smooth blackcurrant and wild berry profile with a floral lift — our most elegant, date-night-coded flavour. Rich, sophisticated, slightly mysterious.

Stunning solo over ice. Pairs beautifully with vodka or a sparkling wine for an effortless martini moment at home.

Serves
1 × 250ml

Creamy · Coastal · Relaxing

Coconut Bahamas

Silky coconut cream layered with a hint of pineapple and lime — a Caribbean coast in a single drop. Creamy, clean, summer-ready.

A Piña Colada with zero blending. Pair with white rum for a quick cocktail or with soda for a guilt-free tropical escape.

What makes Drrop unmissable.

Tap each card to see the proof

Under-2-Minute Ritual

No blender. No jigger. No syrups. One drop, one serve, full flavour — built for the modern Indian kitchen.

Tap for proof →
Proof

Avg pack-to-pour

Formulated with food scientists & leading Indian mixologists. Clean label, low calorie, zero artificial preservatives.

Proof

Owned formulation IP. FSSAI-approved facility. Consumer rating 4.6★+ across Amazon & D2C.

4.6★+

Q-Commerce Native

Lightweight, stackable, single-serve pack size. Ready for Blinkit/Zepto/Instamart unit economics — unlike 750ml syrup bottles.

Tap for proof →
Proof

Pack footprint ~45 cm³, room-temp shelf stable. Fits q-commerce dark-store picklist economics natively.

~45 cm³
Picklist footprint

Gifting-First Pack

Our 3-pack and hamper SKUs turn Drrop into a premium corporate gift, a housewarming add-on, and a Diwali favourite.

Tap for proof →
Proof

6-pack hamper at ₹1,199 MRP — a clean corporate/Diwali price-point with healthy unit economics.

₹1,199
Hamper SKU

Lifestyle, Not Commodity

Positioned as a lifestyle ritual — like a craft coffee brew — not as a fruit juice substitute. Higher margin, higher LTV.

Tap for proof →
Proof

Target 62–66% gross margin at scale vs. 18-25% for RTDs. Brand pricing anchored to craft-coffee parallels.

The Opportunity

Non-alcoholic mixers → ₹5,500 Cr by 2030.

India's non-alcoholic mixers & at-home beverage category is growing ~14% YoY, with no dominant single-serve premium player.

Estimated value in ₹ Cr · 5-year trajectory

Where Drrop Sits

Category whitespace analysis

The Business

Omni-channel, asset-light, margin-healthy.

A digital-first D2C brand with accelerating q-commerce and a clear path into modern trade, HoReCa, and gifting.

Channel Mix — Year 3

Target revenue distribution

Projected Revenue & Gross Margin

₹ Cr · FY 2026-27 to FY 2030-31

The Journey

Five phases. One iconic consumer brand.

01
FY 2026-27

Foundation

3 SKU launch · Amazon + D2C live · Pan-India seed cities · Founding team in place.

02
FY 2027-28

Q-Commerce

Blinkit · Zepto · Instamart rollout. Hamper SKU. Influencer + mixologist-led brand.

03
FY 2028-29

Modern Trade

Tier-1 MT entry. 2 new flavours. HoReCa & bar-chain partnerships. Export pilot UAE.

04
FY 2029-30

Category Lead

6+ SKUs. Drrop becomes category-defining for instant mixers. Gifting vertical scaled.

05
FY 2030-31

Adjacencies

Wellness drops · kid-safe hydration · licensed alcoholic RTD partnership · global expansion.

The Team

Built by Ex-Army brothers. Run with military discipline.

Two co-founders, one mission — build India's iconic instant-beverage brand with the rigour of a regimental deployment.

SS

Maj Shubham Sachdeva

Co-Founder

Indian Army veteran turned consumer-brand operator. Leads product, brand, and growth at Drrop. Sets the North-Star on taste, design, and the Drrop ritual.

KK

Maj Kshitij Khurana

Co-Founder

Indian Army veteran. Runs operations, manufacturing, supply chain, and commercials at Drrop. Builds the backbone that lets the brand scale without breaking.

The Partnership

Why Fireside is the right home for Drrop.

We're not only looking for capital — we're looking for a partner who has built the consumer-brand playbook 70-80% of the time.

  • 01
    Consumer-brand specialists, not generalists.Fireside is the only India VC built ground-up for digital-first consumer brands. Fund IV (₹2,265 Cr) is deployed almost entirely in our arena.
  • 02
    A Fireside-shaped F&B portfolio.Frubon, Sweet Karam Coffee, The Good Bug, Slurrp Farm — Drrop fits this house naturally. Especially alongside Ankita's work with Pilgrim & Kapiva.
  • 03
    Playbook partner, not just capital.Hands-on support across HR, marketing, and brand partnerships is exactly what a young F&B brand needs at seed.
  • 04
    Kanwaljit's lineage, our tailwind.Paper Boat, ID Fresh, Epigamia — Fireside's founder has shaped every wave of Indian consumer beverages. Drrop wants to be the next one.
  • 05
    Stage-fit & check-size-fit.Fireside's seed-stage sweet spot & average Series A check size map cleanly to our current round and 18-month milestones.
